# F.E.A.R.: First Encounter Assault Recon

name: Mostly Full Brightness
mode: once
w32 001DE890 60000000
w32 001DE894 60000000
w32 001DE8A0 60000000
w32 001DE934 60000000
w32 001DE93C 60000000
w32 001DE940 60000000

name: Infinite Starting Focus Capacity
mode: once
w32 005D9C60 3C007F80
w32 005D9C64 901B0064
w32 005DBFCC 3C007F80
w32 005DBFD0 901B0064
w32 005DBFD4 480D3241

name: Focus Always Starts Decreasing From Full
mode: once
w32 005DC278 60000000

name: Nothing Attacks
mode: once
w32 0084F194 60000000
w32 008557B4 60000000
w32 008557C4 60000000
w32 008558AC 60000000

name: Flashlight Battery Never Decreases
mode: once
w32 0034997C 60000000

name: Ammo + Grenades Never Decrease
mode: once
w32 0035F944 60000000
w32 0044E6A0 813F01FC
w32 00869744 60000000

name: Slow Motion Never Decreases
mode: once
w32 0057BF48 3C607FF0
w32 0057BF70 907C0008

name: Medical Kits Do Not Decrease
mode: once
w32 0035E87C 3920000A
w32 005E0984 3800000A

name: Your Health Never Decreases, Enemies Die From Any Damage
mode: once
w32 00F0E5C0 893F0084
w32 00F0E5C4 2F890000
w32 00F0E5C8 EC000028
w32 00F0E5CC 48000020
w32 00F0E5EC D01F0074
w32 00F0E5F0 D01F007C
w32 00F0E5F4 409E0054
w32 00F0E5F8 48000020
w32 00F0E618 C01F0078
w32 00F0E61C D01F007C
w32 00F0E620 C01F0070
w32 00F0E624 48000020
w32 00F0E644 D01F0074
w32 00F0E648 813F0158
w32 00F0E64C 4B9F5070
w32 009036B8 4860AF08
